full_text:
The tumor was approximately 1 cm in diameter, white and soft

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase.

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++ .

The final pellet was resuspended in 2.5 ml of DMEM/F12+++. For counting, a 10 ul of cell suspension was taken.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 2x 2.5E6 cells

Labelled: S551_iAdnL 2.5 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.88
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.813
 | viability [%] | 43.2
 | size [µm] | 9.6
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 2.11
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.702
 | viability [%] | 33.2
 | size [µm] | 8.5
Average | [cells/ml] | 1.995 E6
 | total [cells] | 4.98 E6 in 2.5 ml
 | viability [%] | 38.25
